message:
feat(ftui-widgets): fix widget behavior and improve text input handling

Columns: use Constraint::Fill instead of Constraint::Ratio(1,1) for
equal-width column sizing, which is more semantically correct and avoids
layout edge cases with ratio normalization.

TextInput: delete selection before starting IME composition so the
composition replaces the selected text as users expect. Extract text
sanitization into a reusable sanitize_input_text() method. Add pre-check
for paste-with-selection under max_length constraints to reject oversized
payloads before deleting the selection, preventing data loss. Simplify
word navigation to use a two-class model (word vs separator) instead of
a three-class model, making Ctrl+Left/Right behavior more intuitive and
consistent with common editor conventions. Fix scroll snapping to use <=
instead of < for cursor visibility check, preventing off-by-one at the
viewport boundary. Fix StyleFlags::UNDERLINED -> UNDERLINE for IME
composition rendering. Apply rustfmt to various multi-line expressions.

LogViewer: when follow mode is enabled and visible_count is known, compute
the actual scroll offset immediately instead of using usize::MAX sentinel,
reducing unnecessary clamping during the next render.

Scrollbar: use saturating_sub for end_offset calculation to prevent
underflow panic when length is smaller than end_offset.

Table: preserve scroll offset on deselect instead of resetting to 0,
preventing jarring viewport jumps when toggling selection state.

Tree: rewrite node_at_visible_index_mut() to use a two-phase approach:
first find the string path via read-only traversal (which respects search
filtering), then walk the mutable tree using the path. This fixes the
previous implementation which bypassed search filtering and could return
wrong nodes.

Virtualized: clamp scroll_offset to valid range in visible_range() to
prevent out-of-bounds access. Use usize::MAX sentinel in scroll_to_bottom
when visible_count is unknown (0), letting visible_range() clamp lazily.
Add empty-list guard to scroll_to_bottom. Fix scroll_to_bottom test
expectation to match new sentinel behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
